info.title: Map Dependency
info.description: The 'map_dependency' API allows users to manage dependencies between picklist fields in a module layout. It supports operations to retrieve, create, update, and delete field dependencies. These dependencies are used to define relationships between parent and child fields, ensuring that the values in the child field are dynamically filtered based on the selected value in the parent field.

get.summary: Retrieve field dependencies for a layout
get.description: Retrieves the list of field dependencies for a specific layout in a module. The response includes parent and child field relationships and its additional metadata.

200.description: Successful response containing the list of field dependencies for the specified layout.

schema.description: Response containing field dependencies and pagination information.

items.description: Field dependency object containing parent and child field relationships.

oneOf.description: Null when there is no sub-module association.
Details for sub form if incase of sub form field dependency.

id.description: The unique identifier of subform module

api_name.description: The API name of subform module

internal.description: Indicates whether the dependency is system defined or created by user.

active.description: Indicates whether the dependency is active in layout or not.

id.description: The unique identifier of the dependency.

source.description: Source through which dependency is created. `1` represents the source as CRM.

category.description: The category of the dependency. `0` represents the default category.

per_page.description: The number of records per page.

count.description: The number of records in the current page.

more_records.description: Indicates whether there are more records to fetch.

204.description: No content. No field dependencies were found for the specified layout.

400.description: Bad request. The request contains invalid parameters or data.

code.description: Error code indicating the type of error

post.summary: Create a new field dependency for a layout
post.description: Creates a new field dependency mapping between parent and child fields in a specific layout. The dependency defines how child field values are controlled based on parent field selections.

schema.description: Request body for creating a field dependency

map_dependency.description: Array containing the field dependency to create. Only one dependency can be created per request.

pick_list_values.description: Mapping between parent picklist values and child picklist values

internal.description: Indicates whether the dependency is system defined or created by user

active.description: Indicates whether the dependency is active in the layout

id.description: The unique identifier of the dependency (for updates)

source.description: Source through which dependency is created. 1 represents CRM.

201.description: Created. The field dependency was successfully created.

schema.description: Success response for creating a field dependency

400.description: Bad request. The request contains invalid parameters, data, or violates dependency rules.

oneOf.description: Field-level error response wrapped in map_dependency array

get.summary: Retrieve a specific field dependency by ID
get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific field dependency including parent and child field relationships with picklist value mappings.

200.description: Successful response containing the field dependency details with complete picklist mappings.

schema.description: Response containing a specific field dependency with detailed picklist mappings

map_dependency.description: An array containing the field dependency (single item)

items.description: Field dependency object with complete picklist value mappings

pick_list_values.description: Complete mapping between parent and child picklist values

internal.description: Indicates whether the dependency is system defined or created by user

active.description: Indicates whether the dependency is active in layout or not

id.description: The unique identifier of the dependency

source.description: Source through which dependency is created. 1 represents CRM

204.description: No content. The specified dependency was not found.

400.description: Bad request. The request contains invalid parameters or data.

code.description: Error code indicating the type of error

put.description: Updates the picklist value mappings for an existing field dependency. Use "_delete": null to remove specific mappings.

schema.description: Request body for updating a field dependency

map_dependency.description: Array containing the field dependency to update. Only one dependency can be updated per request.

items.description: Field dependency configuration with updated mappings

pick_list_values.description: Updated mapping between parent picklist values and child picklist values

internal.description: Indicates whether the dependency is system defined or created by user

active.description: Indicates whether the dependency is active in the layout

id.description: The unique identifier of the dependency

source.description: Source through which dependency is created. 1 represents CRM.

200.description: Success. The field dependency was successfully updated.

schema.description: Success response for updating a field dependency

400.description: Bad request. The request contains invalid parameters, data, or violates dependency rules.

oneOf.description: Field-level error response wrapped in map_dependency array

delete.description: Deletes an existing field dependency from a specific layout. This operation permanently removes the dependency mapping between parent and child fields.

200.description: Success. The field dependency was successfully deleted.

schema.description: Success response for deleting a field dependency

400.description: Bad request. The request contains invalid parameters or data.

LayoutId.name: layoutId
LayoutId.description: The unique identifier of the layout

DependencyId.name: dependencyId
DependencyId.description: The unique identifier of the map dependency

Module.name: module
Module.description: API name of the module to which the layout belongs

Filters.name: filters
Filters.description: Filter criteria for field dependencies in JSON format. Maximum length is 100 characters.

Page.name: page
Page.description: The page number to retrieve. Defaults to 1 if not specified.

PerPage.name: per_page
PerPage.description: The number of records to retrieve per page. Defaults to 20 if not specified.

FieldReference.description: Reference to a field with ID and API name

id.description: The unique identifier of the field

api_name.description: The API name of the field

id.description: The unique identifier of the picklist option

actual_value.description: The actual value of the picklist option

display_value.description: The display value of the picklist option

PicklistMappingCreate.description: Parent picklist value with its mapped child values for create/update operations

id.description: The unique identifier of the parent picklist option

actual_value.description: The actual value of the parent picklist option

display_value.description: The display value of the parent picklist option

maps.description: Child picklist values mapped to this parent value

items.description: Child picklist option reference. For examples, may include actual_value and display_value.

id.description: The unique identifier of the child picklist option

actual_value.description: The actual value of the child picklist option (optional for request, shown in examples for clarity)

display_value.description: The display value of the child picklist option (optional for request, shown in examples for clarity)

PicklistMappingRead.description: Parent picklist value with complete mapped child values for read operations

id.description: The unique identifier of the parent picklist option

actual_value.description: The actual value of the parent picklist option

display_value.description: The display value of the parent picklist option

maps.description: Child picklist values mapped to this parent value

PicklistMappingUpdate.description: Parent picklist value with its mapped child values for update operations. Supports deletion with _delete property.

id.description: The unique identifier of the parent picklist option

actual_value.description: The actual value of the parent picklist option

display_value.description: The display value of the parent picklist option

maps.description: Child picklist values mapped to this parent value

items.description: Child picklist option details. Use "_delete": null to remove this mapping.

id.description: The unique identifier of the child picklist option

actual_value.description: The actual value of the child picklist option

display_value.description: The display value of the child picklist option

_delete.description: Set to null to delete this mapping

id.description: The unique identifier of the dependency

ForbiddenError.description: Forbidden. The user does not have the required permission.

NotFoundError.description: Not found. The requested resource could not be found.

schema.description: Error response for not found resources

code.description: Error code indicating the type of error

schema.description: Internal server error response object containing code, message, details, and status.

code.description: Error code indicating the type of error.
